name: fdxA
function: Ferredoxin A; involved in electron transport chain during respiration, hypoxia response, and DNA excision repair (PMID 18948063, PMID 30810776). Acts as a redox partner for CYP143A1 (PMID 30810776). DosR-regulated (PMID 18948063).
infection_impact: May be important for bacillary persistence during latency and early reactivation (PMID 18948063). Essential for host infection (PMID 30810776).
